# Edge Cases

- [ ] No tags at all
- [ ] Tag at start @today of the line
- [ ] Multiple same tag @risk and @risk again
- [ ] Empty parens @note()
- [ ] Unicode text 日本語タスク @today
- [ ] Very long tag value @delegated(some very long person name here)
- [ ] Nested parens in text (not a tag) @due(2026-04-01)
